scripts.build: npm run typechain && tsc && frog vercel-build && mkdir -p .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func && mv .vercel/output/functions/api/index.js .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func/index.js && echo '{"runtime":"nodejs18.x","handler":"index.js","launcherType":"Nodejs"}' > .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func/.vc-config
